summary: V11.3 — Validation of 3 NEW Gas Natural Studio sections (Suduri & calitate, Procese Verbale, Documente generate) + 2 NEW backend endpoints (GET /api/gas/templates-catalog and POST /api/gas/doc-preview/{template_id}) + extended master DOCX. FULL PASS on PREVIEW. Backend: 10/10 pytest in test_v113_gas_new_sections.py. Templates catalog returns 34 templates with required ids (predare_amplasament, memoriu_tehnic, cerere_atr, pv_receptie all present). doc-preview returns valid DOCX (>5KB) for each of the 4 critical template_ids, returns 404 for invalid template_id, and requires auth (401 without bearer). Master DOCX preview accepts new sudor_nume/sudor_autorizatie/examinare_vizuala/protocol_electrofuziune/procese_verbale fields and returns 30KB+ DOCX; still works without those (backwards-compatible). Frontend: login (Autentificare EPD, NOT Google) → /gaze-naturale loads with 10 sidebar sections (was 7). Suduri: filling sudor_nume='Ion Pop', sudor_autorizatie='ANRE-12345' OK; examinare-add x3 creates exactly 3 rows with auto-fill; sud-admise badge shows 'Admise3', sud-respinse shows 'Respinse0'; protocol-add creates row OK. PV: pv-add creates row; pv-0-tip select has 10 PV types and 'PV Recepție tehnică branșament' selects OK. Documente: 6 phase groups, 34 template cards rendered; doc-search filtering 'memoriu' narrows to 3 templates; clicking download-memoriu_tehnic downloads 38817-byte DOCX from /api/gas/doc-preview/memoriu_tehnic.

tests_executed.detail: Selected 'PV Recepție tehnică branșament' from 10 options

critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/gas/doc-preview/{template_id} accepts arbitrary dict payload (no Pydantic model) — consistent with master-docx-preview but consider a typed schema. Also filename sanitization (line 2984-2990 in server.py) is good (latin-1 safe) — keep it.

Master DOCX synchronous build (gas_master_template.build_master_docx) now produces ~40KB doc; consider running via fastapi.concurrency.run_in_threadpool to keep event loop responsive under load (previously flagged in iteration_21).
GasNaturalStudio.jsx is approaching the 700-line threshold — section configuration array is fine inline, but consider extracting SECTIONS list to /src/data/gas_sections.js for clarity.

GasDocumenteSection.jsx uses /api/gas/doc-preview for download; make sure error toast is shown on 500 (e.g., if backend template generation throws). UI currently relies on default browser download fail — silent failure UX-wise.
test_credentials: dragosserban95@gmail.com / Nuamparola_9 (from /app/memory/test_credentials.md). Use 'Autentificare EPD' email form — NOT Google.
seed_data_creation: No DB writes. Two preview DOCX downloads (no persistence).
context_for_next_testing_agent: V11.3 Gas Studio with 10 sections is fully healthy on PREVIEW. (1) New endpoints: GET /api/gas/templates-catalog (auth) → {templates: [...34 items]}; POST /api/gas/doc-preview/{template_id} (auth) → streaming DOCX, 404 on unknown id. Filename diacritics already sanitized (latin-1 safe). (2) New sidebar sections testids: section-nav-suduri, section-nav-pv, section-nav-documente. (3) Sub-component testids: field-sud-sudor_nume, field-sud-sudor_autorizatie, examinare-add, examinare-row-{i}, sud-admise, sud-respinse, protocol-add, protocol-row-{i}, pv-add, pv-row-{i}, pv-{i}-tip (select), doc-search, phase-{phase}, template-{id}, download-{id}. (4) Master DOCX preview (POST /api/gas/master-docx-preview) now accepts sudor_nume, sudor_autorizatie, examinare_vizuala[], protocol_electrofuziune[], procese_verbale[] in payload — still backwards-compatible. (5) 34 templates available, grouped into 6 phases (cu, dtac, pt, executie, pif, receptie). Memoriu_tehnic returns 38.8KB DOCX. No retest needed.
rca of the issue: N/A — no issues reproduced. All V11.3 acceptance criteria from review_request items 1-9 pass on PREVIEW.
